heading: box Example
body:
The following query uses the `geoWithin` operator with
the `box` field to search for
properties within a bounding box in Australia.

The query includes a:

- [$limit](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/limit) stage to limit the output to `3` results.

- [$project](manual/reference/operator/aggregation/project) stage to exclude all fields except `name` and
  `address`.

> **Note:** You don't need to specify indexes named `default` in your MongoDB Search
> query. If your index has any other name, you must specify the
> `index` field.
